title: asphodelus refractus
intro: Asphodelus refractus, also known as the fragmented or broken asphodel, is a plant species belonging to the asphodel family and is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The plant has been shown to have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and relieving urinary tract issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Asphodelus refractus can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including kidney stones, cystitis, and other urinary tract problems.
